findings.text: NAP-SRC-0020 is a Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University to ANFAL ELBUSHRA, dated 20 April 2026, citing breach of Clause 2 of the Tenancy Agreement.
The notice requires the tenant to vacate Bedroom B, Flat 05, Castlelaw House, and states an Accommodation Officer will make arrangements.
The notice is signed by Brydon Connolly, Student Accommodation, with contact details including Tel: 0131 455 3713 and Fax: 0131 408 8728.
OCR confidence is low (0.65); the termination date and exact wording of Clause 2 are illegible. A corrected text artifact is proposed.

proposed_artifacts.content:
Edinburgh Napier University

BY HAND

ANFAL ELBUSHRA
Facilities Services
Bedroom B, Flat 05, Castlelaw House
Student Accommodation
1E Slateford Road
Edinburgh, City of Edinburgh
EH11 1FE, United Kingdom

EDINBURGH EH11 4SN
Tel: 0131 455 3713

20 April 2026
Fax: 0131 408 8728

Dear ANFAL ELBUSHRA

Student Number: 40805511

NOTICE TO QUIT
THE COURT OF EDINBURGH NAPIER UNIVERSITY

For and on behalf of your Landlord, The Court of Edinburgh Napier University hereby intimate to you that in respect that you have breached the Tenancy Agreement in respect of the above property, in that you have breached Clause 2 of the said Tenancy Agreement, the said Court of Edinburgh Napier University holds the Tenancy Agreement as terminated as at [date illegible] and requires you to move from Bedroom B, Flat 05, Castlelaw House on that date.

An Accommodation Officer will make arrangements.

Yours sincerely,
Brydon Connolly
Student Accommodation
proposed_artifacts.title: Corrected text for NAP-SRC-0020

proposed_tasks.instructions: Review the original image NAP-SRC-0020 (WhatsApp Image 2026-04-28 at 12.34.22 PM.jpeg) to determine the exact termination date stated in the Notice to Quit. The OCR could not read it. Report the date or confirm it remains illegible.
proposed_tasks.title: Verify termination date in NAP-SRC-0020

summary: OCR-extracted text from NAP-SRC-0020 (a WhatsApp image of a Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University) contains numerous errors. The corrected text is proposed as a candidate artifact. The source is a Notice to Quit addressed to ANFAL ELBUSHRA, citing breach of tenancy Clause 2, terminating the tenancy as at a date (illegible in OCR) and requiring vacating Bedroom B, Flat 05, Castlelaw House. The OCR confidence is low (0.65), and several fields (date, clause details) remain uncertain.

uncertainties.reason: OCR errors obscure the termination date and the precise language of Clause 2 breach.
